title: Identically named interfaces across hierarchy confuses Verilator

features.name: interface with modport definition
features.description: Code should include an interface definition with a modport that has input and output signals

features.name: disconnected interface instance inside module
features.description: Code should include a module that declares an interface instance internally but does not connect it to the module's interface ports

features.name: interface pass through module hierarchy
features.description: Code should include a module that passes an interface from its input port to a submodule instance

features.name: identically named interfaces across hierarchy
features.description: Code should include interface instances with identical names at different hierarchy levels that should be independent but are confused by the tool
